'''鈭歳-t-ng''' ('''karatang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:penknife|penknife]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:penknife|penknife]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-t-ng
|-
! Lemma
| karatang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiratang|thiratang]] || [[word:jiratang|jiratang]] || [[word:shiratang|shiratang]] || [[word:kiratang|kiratang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuratang|thuthuratang]] || [[word:jujuratang|jujuratang]] || [[word:shushuratang|shushuratang]] || [[word:kukuratang|kukuratang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuratang|thuratang]] || [[word:juratang|juratang]] || [[word:shuratang|shuratang]] || [[word:kuratang|kuratang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuratang|thuratang]] || [[word:juratang|juratang]] || [[word:shuratang|shuratang]] || [[word:kuratang|kuratang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theratang|theratang]] || [[word:jeratang|jeratang]] || [[word:sheratang|sheratang]] || [[word:keratang|keratang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoratang|thothoratang]] || [[word:jojoratang|jojoratang]] || [[word:shoshoratang|shoshoratang]] || [[word:kokoratang|kokoratang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoratang|thoratang]] || [[word:joratang|joratang]] || [[word:shoratang|shoratang]] || [[word:koratang|koratang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoratang|thoratang]] || [[word:joratang|joratang]] || [[word:shoratang|shoratang]] || [[word:koratang|koratang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]] || [[word:ratang|ratang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ratang|th忙ratang]] || [[word:j忙ratang|j忙ratang]] || [[word:sh忙ratang|sh忙ratang]] || [[word:k忙ratang|k忙ratang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharatang|thatharatang]] || [[word:jajaratang|jajaratang]] || [[word:shasharatang|shasharatang]] || [[word:kakaratang|kakaratang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharatang|tharatang]] || [[word:jaratang|jaratang]] || [[word:sharatang|sharatang]] || [[word:karatang|karatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharatang|tharatang]] || [[word:jaratang|jaratang]] || [[word:sharatang|sharatang]] || [[word:karatang|karatang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharatang|sharatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharatang|gosharatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharatang|gokisharatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharatangn眉|sharatangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharatangnkn眉|gosharatangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatangn眉|gokisharatangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharatangsh毛|sharatangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharatangnksh毛|gosharatangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharatangsh毛|gokisharatangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatangro|sharatangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatangnkro|gosharatangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatangro|gokisharatangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatangmu|sharatangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatangnkmu|gosharatangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatangmu|gokisharatangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharatangsher|sharatangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharatangnksher|gosharatangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharatangsher|gokisharatangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharatangng|sharatangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharatangnkng|gosharatangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharatangng|gokisharatangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharatangya|sharatangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharatangnkya|gosharatangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharatangya|gokisharatangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharatangyam|sharatangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharatangnkyam|gosharatangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharatangyam|gokisharatangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatangn眉sh毛|sharatangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatangnkn眉sh毛|gosharatangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatangn眉sh毛|gokisharatangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatangn眉ro|sharatangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatangnkn眉ro|gosharatangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatangn眉ro|gokisharatangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatangn眉mu|sharatangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatangnkn眉mu|gosharatangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatangn眉mu|gokisharatangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatangsh毛n眉|sharatangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatangnksh毛n眉|gosharatangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatangsh毛n眉|gokisharatangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatangsh毛ro|sharatangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatangnksh毛ro|gosharatangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatangsh毛ro|gokisharatangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatangsh毛mu|sharatangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatangnksh毛mu|gosharatangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatangsh毛mu|gokisharatangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatangron眉|sharatangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatangnkron眉|gosharatangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatangron眉|gokisharatangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatangrosh毛|sharatangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatangnkrosh毛|gosharatangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatangrosh毛|gokisharatangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatangromu|sharatangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatangnkromu|gosharatangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatangromu|gokisharatangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatangmun眉|sharatangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatangnkmun眉|gosharatangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatangmun眉|gokisharatangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatangmush毛|sharatangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatangnkmush毛|gosharatangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatangmush毛|gokisharatangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatangmuro|sharatangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatangnkmuro|gosharatangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatangmuro|gokisharatangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
